steps.title: Use the touch clue
steps.content: The passage says star-forming gas and dust cannot be touched, but Mensah uses 3D printers to create interactive models. The blank must describe the original untouchable quality that her models help overcome.

steps.title: Select the matching word
steps.content: A means regrettable, B means explainable, and D means able to be repeated. None connects to physical touch. The needed word means unable to be touched or physically grasped. The answer is C.
